description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomy was proceeding straight on Folsom Street when a leading vehicle in the lane began to slow down prompting 
the Zoox vehicle to slow correspondingly. The Zoox vehicle, with brake lights illuminated, had slowed to 5 mph when it was struck from 
the rear by vehicle number 2. Zoox vehicle camera footage shows the driver of vehicle 2 holding their cellphone raised in their right hand. 
There were no injuries and police were not called. 
 
 
 
 
Print
Clear Form
